products.name: Crispy Vegetable Fritters
products.description: Golden-fried seasonal vegetables coated in spiced chickpea batter, served with tangy mint chutney.

products.name: Masala Corn Bhel
products.description: Sweet corn kernels tossed with onions, tomatoes, and chaat masala—a refreshing street-style snack.

products.name: Stuffed Mirchi Pakora
products.description: Large green chilies stuffed with spiced potato, dipped in gram flour batter and deep-fried to perfection.

products.name: Paneer Tikka Bites
products.description: Cubes of fresh paneer marinated in yogurt and spices, grilled until golden and served with mint chutney.

products.name: Aloo Tikki Chaat
products.description: Spiced potato patties topped with tangy tamarind chutney, yogurt, and fresh coriander.

products.name: Chicken 65
products.description: Fiery morsels of chicken tossed with curry leaves, red chili, and secret house masalas—crackling with heat and bursting with flavor.

products.name: Tandoori Chicken Wings
products.description: Marinated overnight in yogurt and robust Indian spices, then slow-roasted in the tandoor until smoky and succulent.

products.name: Lamb Seekh Kebab
products.description: Skewered rolls of minced lamb, infused with fresh herbs and earthy spices, grilled to perfection.

products.name: Fish Amritsari
products.description: Fresh fish fillets marinated in spiced gram flour batter, deep-fried until golden and crispy.

products.name: Prawn Tempura
products.description: Plump prawns coated in a light, crispy batter and fried to golden perfection, served with spicy mayo.

products.name: Mulligatawny Soup
products.description: A rich, aromatic soup with lentils, vegetables, and spices—a British-Indian classic with deep, warming flavors.

products.name: Chicken Noodle Soup
products.description: A comforting broth with tender chicken pieces, vegetables, and fine noodles, spiced with ginger and garlic.

products.name: Tomato Rasam
products.description: A tangy South Indian soup with tomatoes, tamarind, and aromatic spices—light, refreshing, and digestive.

products.name: Lamb Shorba
products.description: A clear, aromatic lamb broth delicately spiced with crushed pepper and fresh herbs—elegant and restorative.

products.name: Sweet Corn Soup
products.description: Creamy sweet corn soup with vegetables, finished with a hint of black pepper and fresh coriander.

products.name: Mint Raita
products.description: Cool yogurt blended with fresh mint leaves, cumin, and a hint of green chili—refreshing and palate-cleansing.

products.name: Beetroot Raita
products.description: Vibrant yogurt mixed with grated beetroot, roasted cumin, and fresh herbs—colorful and nutritious.

products.name: Kachumber Salad
products.description: A fresh medley of diced cucumber, tomatoes, onions, and coriander, dressed with lemon and chaat masala.

products.name: Pineapple Raita
products.description: Sweet and tangy yogurt with fresh pineapple chunks, roasted cumin, and a hint of black salt.

products.name: Sprouted Moong Salad
products.description: Protein-rich sprouted mung beans tossed with onions, tomatoes, and tangy spices—healthy and flavorful.

products.name: Paneer Tikka
products.description: Cubes of fresh paneer marinated in yogurt and spices, grilled until golden and served with mint chutney.

products.name: Chicken Tikka
products.description: Boneless chicken chunks marinated in yogurt, ginger, and masalas, roasted to golden perfection.

products.name: Hara Bhara Kebab
products.description: Green vegetable kebabs made with spinach, peas, and potatoes, grilled to perfection.

products.name: Lamb Chops
products.description: Tender lamb chops marinated in royal spices and grilled to perfection—succulent and aromatic.

products.name: Prawn Malai Curry
products.description: King prawns cooked in a creamy coconut-based curry with mild spices—delicate and luxurious.

products.name: Butter Chicken
products.description: Tender chicken simmered in a silky tomato-butter sauce, finished with cream and a hint of fenugreek.

products.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
products.description: Chargrilled chicken tikka simmered in a vibrant, spiced tomato-cream sauce—bold, smoky, and full of character.

products.name: Lamb Rogan Josh
products.description: Lamb in Kashmiri classic—fiery red and aromatic with slow-cooked richness and warmth.

products.name: Paneer Butter Masala
products.description: Fresh paneer in rich, creamy tomato-based curry—comforting and indulgent.

products.name: Fish Curry
products.description: Ocean-fresh fish fillets simmered in a tangy coconut-based curry with traditional spices.

products.name: Tandoori Mixed Grill
products.description: A royal platter featuring chicken tikka, lamb tikka, seekh kebab, and tandoori prawns—all served sizzling hot.

products.name: Tandoori Chicken Full
products.description: Juicy chicken on the bone, marinated overnight in yogurt and spices, flame-roasted until charred and tender.

products.name: Paneer Tikka Sizzler
products.description: Grilled paneer cubes with bell peppers and onions, served sizzling on a hot plate with mint chutney.

products.name: Tandoori King Prawns
products.description: Majestic king prawns bathed in a luxurious marinade, kissed by fire in the tandoor—juicy, smoky, and regal.

products.name: Lamb Seekh Kebab Sizzler
products.description: Skewered rolls of minced lamb, infused with herbs and spices, grilled and served sizzling hot.

products.name: Chicken Biryani
products.description: Marinated chicken nestled between layers of golden rice and saffron, sealed and slow-cooked to perfection.

products.name: Lamb Korma
products.description: Juicy lamb in royal cashew, cream, and coconut sauce—velvety, golden, and gently spiced.

products.name: Goan Fish Curry
products.description: Fresh fish fillets simmered in a tangy coconut-based curry with tamarind, mustard seeds, and curry leaves.

products.name: Afghani Chicken
products.description: Creamy, nutty, and mildly spiced—chicken slow-cooked in a luxurious blend of yogurt, cashews, and aromatic spices.

products.name: Prawn Malabar
products.description: King prawns in coconut-based curry with traditional Malabar spices—tangy and aromatic.

products.name: Paneer Tikka Masala
products.description: Cubes of fresh, soft paneer simmered in a luscious tomato-based gravy—smoky, creamy, and spiced just right.

products.name: Saag Paneer
products.description: A velvety blend of spinach and Indian cottage cheese, enriched with subtle spices—nourishing and harmonious.

products.name: Malai Kofta
products.description: Soft vegetable dumplings in a rich, creamy cashew and tomato sauce—indulgent, aromatic, and festive.

products.name: Chana Masala
products.description: Chickpeas slow-cooked with ginger, garlic, and garam masala—a hearty and soulful dish packed with warmth.

products.name: Bhindi Masala
products.description: Okra sautéed with onions, tomatoes, and traditional spices—dry, hearty, and packed with rustic northern flavor.

products.name: Vegetable Biryani
products.description: A vibrant medley of garden vegetables layered with fragrant basmati rice, saffron, and warming spices—slow-cooked to perfection.

products.name: Lamb Biryani
products.description: Succulent pieces of lamb marinated in traditional spices and slow-cooked between layers of aromatic basmati rice.

products.name: Jeera Rice
products.description: Fragrant basmati tempered with roasted cumin seeds—simple, earthy, and utterly comforting.

products.name: Pilau Rice
products.description: Basmati rice cooked with whole spices—golden, aromatic, and subtly spiced.

products.name: Saffron Special Rice
products.description: A golden celebration—basmati rice delicately kissed with royal saffron strands and a hint of cardamom.

products.name: Garlic Naan
products.description: Infused with fresh garlic and brushed with butter, this naan adds a bold, aromatic flair to every bite.

products.name: Butter Naan
products.description: Fluffy naan brushed with creamy butter—simple, luxurious, and comforting.

products.name: Cheese Naan
products.description: Oozing with molten cheese and baked until golden—indulgent, creamy, and utterly satisfying.

products.name: Tandoori Roti
products.description: Whole wheat flatbread with a smoky char and hearty bite—a rustic favorite from the tandoor.

products.name: Peshawari Naan
products.description: Stuffed with a sweet mix of coconut, raisins, and nuts—rich, aromatic, and royally indulgent.

products.name: Veg Meat Kadhai
products.description: Succulent plant-based protein simmered with bell peppers, onions, and bold spices in a thick, tangy tomato masala.

products.name: Saag Aloo
products.description: Tender potatoes simmered in spiced spinach puree—lush, vibrant, and rich with iron and flavor.

products.name: Mushroom Masala
products.description: Button mushrooms cooked in a rich, spiced tomato-onion gravy—earthy, creamy (without cream), and deliciously umami.

products.name: Daal Tadka
products.description: Golden lentils tempered with garlic, cumin, and red chilies—simple, smoky, and soul-warming.

products.name: Mango Lassi
products.description: A velvety blend of sweet mango and churned yogurt—smooth, golden, and luxuriously cooling.

products.name: Salted Lassi
products.description: A classic from Indian homes—savory, creamy yogurt drink kissed with roasted cumin for a refreshing twist.

products.name: Masala Chai
products.description: Fragrant black tea simmered with warming spices and milk—soul-stirring, comforting, and deeply aromatic.

products.name: Rose Lassi
products.description: Delicate rose petals blended with creamy yogurt and a hint of cardamom—elegant, floral, and refreshing.

products.name: Fresh Lime Soda
products.description: Sparkling, tangy, and enlivened with fresh lime juice—a zesty refresher with every bubbly sip.

products.name: Gulab Jamun
products.description: Soft, golden dumplings soaked in rose-scented syrup—warm, melt-in-the-mouth, and utterly divine.

products.name: Gajar Halwa
products.description: Carrots lovingly slow-cooked in milk, ghee, and sugar, studded with nuts—warm, rich, and soul-stirring.

products.name: Kheer
products.description: Traditional rice pudding slow-cooked with milk, cardamom, and saffron—creamy, aromatic, and comforting.

products.name: Rasmalai
products.description: Soft, spongy cheese dumplings soaked in sweetened, saffron-infused milk—delicate and luxurious.

products.name: Jalebi
products.description: Crispy, golden spirals soaked in sugar syrup—sweet, sticky, and irresistibly indulgent.

products.name: Mini Chicken Nuggets
products.description: Juicy chicken nuggets paired with a side of fries—crunchy, satisfying, and always a hit with kids.

products.name: Cheesy Naan Pizza
products.description: A fun twist—naan bread topped with melted cheese and a light tomato masala base. Perfect for little hands!

products.name: Mini Butter Chicken
products.description: Mild, creamy butter chicken served in a kid-friendly portion—gentle on young palates.

products.name: Plain Fries
products.description: Lightly salted and golden-fried—simple, crispy goodness that kids love.

products.name: Vanilla Ice Cream
products.description: A classic scoop of vanilla ice cream—perfect for happy endings and sweet smiles.

products.name: Chana Masala
products.description: Chickpeas slow-cooked in a robust onion-tomato gravy with warming spices—earthy, tangy, and deeply satisfying.

categories.name: Desserts
categories.description: Sweet treats to end your meal

categories.name: Starters
categories.description: Delicious appetizers to start your meal

categories.name: Appetizers
categories.description: Light starters and small plates from across India

categories.name: Vegetarian
categories.description: Authentic vegetarian dishes from different Indian states

categories.name: Quick Bites
categories.description: Irresistibly crisp, boldly spiced, and bursting with flavor—these small bites bring the energy of India's vibrant street food culture and home kitchens straight to your table.

categories.name: Soups
categories.description: Begin your journey with a warm embrace—each spoonful a soul-soothing elixir steeped in Indian tradition.

categories.name: Raita & Salads
categories.description: Cool, refreshing, and vibrant—our raitas and salads are the perfect companions to balance bold spices and elevate every bite. Crafted with fresh ingredients and traditional flavors.

categories.name: Main Curries
categories.description: Create your royal feast—select your preferred protein, then pair it with one of our masterfully crafted sauces. Each curry is a tribute to the age-old kitchens of India, where tradition, fire, and fragrance come together in perfect harmony.

categories.name: Tandoori Sizzlers
categories.description: A showstopper! Bringing drama to your table, our sizzling platters arrive in a cloud of spice and steam—crackling, aromatic, and full of flair. Each dish is a grand performance of bold flavors and royal indulgence, served piping hot and impossible to ignore.

categories.name: Non-Vegetarian Specialties
categories.description: A curated collection of regional classics and royal recipes, each dish rich in heritage and flavor. From coastal comfort to northern indulgence, these specialties celebrate the depth and diversity of India's culinary traditions.

categories.name: Vegetarian Specialties
categories.description: Each dish is a celebration of nature's bounty, cooked with devotion and layered with centuries-old Indian spices. Nourishing, flavorful, and deeply comforting—these vegetarian delights can easily be the star of your table.

categories.name: Biryani & Rice
categories.description: Long-grain basmati rice infused with saffron, whole spices, and centuries of culinary heritage—each grain steeped in aroma and flavor. Whether layered with vegetables or tender meat, our biryanis and rice dishes are a fragrant journey through India's royal kitchens.

categories.name: Breads
categories.description: From the heart of our tandoor to your table, these breads are soft, smoky, and full of soul. Handcrafted daily and baked to golden perfection, they are made to scoop, savor, and soak up every drop of curry royalty.

categories.name: Vegan Mains
categories.description: A celebration of India's vibrant plant-based cuisine—bold spices, rustic textures, and deep, soulful flavors, crafted without dairy or animal products.

categories.name: Drinks
categories.description: Crafted to cool, soothe, and enchant—our drinks are steeped in tradition and poured with love. Whether it's a creamy lassi or a spiced tea, each sip is a celebration of India's vibrant spirit.

categories.name: Kids' Menu
categories.description: Little bites, big smiles—Indian flavors made gentle, joyful, and just right for young appetites.
